steps.title: Use the hypothesis context
steps.content: The text says corpora can empirically test hypotheses about word usage. If someone has a belief that last is frequent, corpus analysis can support that hypothesis with evidence.

steps.title: Choose the belief noun
steps.content: Choice B means a plan or plot. Choice C means a summary. Choice D means acknowledgment or identification. The blank needs a noun meaning assumption or hypothesis. The answer is A.
